testcase.name: Balance Dashboard Flow › should display correct balance metrics
Balance Dashboard Flow › should show warning when expenses exceed threshold
Balance Dashboard Flow › should display balance grid with account details
Expense Entry Flow › should create expense entry with vendor info
testcase.failure:
[e2e-tests] › e2e-tests\expense-entry-flow.spec.ts:12:7 › Expense Entry Flow › should create expense entry with vendor info
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=500.000 ₫') Expected: visible Timeout: 10000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator('text=500.000 ₫')
39 | await page.goto('/accounting/history'); 40 | // Đảm bảo định dạng số tiền đúng chuẩn vi-VN (dấu chấm phân cách hàng nghìn) > 41 | await expect(page.locator('text=500.000 ₫')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 42 | // Assertion cụ thể kiểm tra format theo chuẩn vi-VN 43 | const amountCell = page.locator('[data-testid="datagrid-cell-amount"]').first(); 44 | await expect(amountCell).toHaveText(/500\.000/); at C:\VibeCoding\Gemini_Windsurf\6_Testing\e2e-tests\expense-entry-flow.spec.ts:41:50

testcase.name: Export Excel Flow › should export transaction history to Excel
Export Excel Flow › should export only filtered data
